metadata.title: 向長視野多模態搜尋邁進：LMM-Searcher 框架

core_problem: Context explosion from multimodal inputs over long horizons

visual_representation.description: Visual assets offloaded to external file system, mapped to lightweight textual identifiers
visual_representation.benefit: Mitigates context overhead while preserving multimodal information

fetch_image_tool.strategy: Active perception with intelligent asset retrieval

data_synthesis_pipeline.purpose: Generate queries requiring complex cross-modal multi-hop reasoning

research_insights.core_philosophy: Rather than stuffing all information into the model, design intelligent systems that 'retrieve' needed information on-demand
research_insights.architectural_significance: File-based visual representation mechanism represents important paradigm shift for AI system design
research_insights.implications: Efficiency and quality of heterogeneous information handling will directly impact agent capability ceiling

key_takeaways: Long-horizon multimodal search is no longer a technical bottleneck
Lightweight identifiers + on-demand loading = new AI system design paradigm
Open-source models can achieve SOTA performance
Data synthesis + model fine-tuning = new path to specialized agents

article_structure.format: Threads Post Format with Visual Hierarchy
article_structure.target_audience: AI Researchers, ML Engineers, Multimodal AI Enthusiasts

threads_post_specifications.formatting: Markdown with emoji for visual engagement

quality_metrics.accessibility: Balances technical accuracy with understandable explanations
quality_metrics.engagement: High with emoji, structure, and varied formatting
quality_metrics.accuracy: Based on official arXiv abstract and research specifications
